SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-21-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
James Woo, appellant/defendant in pro per present.
Stephen Aubertin, respondent/plaintiff for deft. BMW of San Francisco, in pro per present.

This cause comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Both parties made oral argument and was examined by the Court. Documentary evidence introduced and marked for identification.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission.
